text: The IC issued a green-light INVEST decision on NovaTech AI.
The IC sent NovaTech a term sheet for a EUR 320,000 SAFE at a EUR 2.2M valuation cap with a 20% discount.
The internal NovaTech term sheet draft and IC memo record a EUR 200,000 SAFE at a EUR 2.3M cap.
The IC decided to INVEST in UrbanFlow at EUR 180,000 for 9% equity, down from the founders' EUR 250,000 ask.
The IC decided to PASS on DataPulse, citing unreconcilable metrics and valuation risk.
The IC decided to PASS on GreenLoop because of weak unit economics and customer concentration.
The IC made a CONDITIONAL offer to MindBridge contingent on hard milestones before any capital deploys.
MindBridge must secure a paying customer at >=EUR 5K MRR, pass an 80% model accuracy validation, and complete a GDPR audit within 6 months.
The UrbanFlow second tranche of EUR 50K unlocks only on reaching 100 active hubs in 3 distinct cities by Month 9.
NovaTech presented 12 beta customers (3 paying) and F1 scores of 0.92 for extraction and 0.85 for compliance flagging at the pitch.
Ava verified only 38,000 DataPulse active accounts against the 50,000 MAU claimed, an unexplained ~24% gap.
FitBrew's October metrics showed CAC spiking to ~EUR 48-52 and runway falling to 5.8 months, a deteriorating unit-economics pattern.
Ava judged NovaTech's EUR 2.3M pre-money at EUR 3.6K MRR (a ~640x multiple) as stretched and demanded EUR 6-8K MRR proof.
Ava was initially skeptical of UrbanFlow as a logistics business while Daniel reframed it as a software-layer play.
The IC hypothesized that UrbanFlow's routing algorithm, not its logistics operation, is the defensible moat, pending IP review.
The IC acknowledged it cannot independently validate NovaTech's NLP benchmark accuracy and left this as an open limitation.
The reference check on CTO Yara Osman remained an open, unresolved action item after deliberation.
Tomás recommended adding a 'conditional pathway' track to the decision tree for future funding rounds.
The weighted scoring matrix recommended INVEST for NovaTech and UrbanFlow, CONDITIONAL for MindBridge, and PASS for GreenLoop and DataPulse.
The NovaTech invitation states the Demo Day venue as Vertex Minds offices in Zurich.
The NovaTech pitch transcript records the Demo Day venue as Palazzo delle Industrie in Milan.
The DataPulse screening summary credited it with 28 customers, EUR 6.2K MRR, and CAC at 1.8x LTV passing the 3x rule.
The deliberation specified the UrbanFlow milestone as a second hub operational within 9 months plus a mandatory IP review.
